Body.Content:
We have identified that you have activated early access to the Entra Group control for model-driven app in-app skills in Power Apps and/or Dynamics 365 Apps. On May 21, 2026, we will switch this feature to a new underlying service in preparation for general availability.

How does this affect me?
This service switch is not expected to have any impact on your users or your existing configuration. Admin controls for this feature remain available in the Power Platform admin center (PPAC) Copilot hub and will continue to work as before.

What action do I need to take?
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

To learn more, please refer to Control who can use AI features in model-driven apps (preview).

message.Title: Power Apps and Dynamics 365 Apps - An upcoming update to Entra Group controls for model driven app in-app skills
